message:
fix(channel+stream): oneshot send ordering and debounce timer-ready emit

oneshot.rs:
  Move `self.sent = true` before `waker.wake()` so that if `wake()`
  panics, Drop does not double-abort the channel — the sent flag is
  already set, preventing the Drop guard from treating a completed
  send as an unsent abort.

debounce.rs:
  When the timer future returns Poll::Ready, immediately drain the
  pending item and emit it instead of silently discarding the ready
  state and returning Pending. Previously, a ready timer was polled
  but its result was thrown away with `let _ = ...`, causing the
  debounced item to be stuck until the next upstream element arrived.
  Add PendingStream mock and regression test that verifies the fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
